text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #10)

Also, this PR is for a couple of issues with the existing version. My new PR is an updated version and these fixes and some other tidying up. If I was able to change this PR title (description) and supecede the attachment I would have continued with this PR. What it the correct procedure for this situation?
